blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing rain, highs of 45°F.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
